heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 410eeee–11 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for the purposes of this subchapter, but not to exceed $20,000,000 for the acquisition of lands and interests in lands, and not to exceed $3,000,000 for development.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to .section 460m–25 of this titleis a corrected version of .Pub. L. 99–591Pub. L. 99–500
Amendments1986—, , , amended section identically substituting “$3,000,000” for “$500,000”.Pub. L. 99–500Pub. L. 99–590Pub. L. 99–591
